name: Resilience: OAuth error and CSRF negative paths
outcome: Failure paths return correct OAuth error responses and cross-origin form POSTs are rejected, proving the vanilla-bridge error mapping and origin-based CSRF.
scope: Negative-path Vitest tests reusing the slice-14 test-DB harness: OAuthException error-response mapping, bad client secret, expired auth code, revoked/expired refresh token, and hono/csrf rejection. No new test infra.
acceptance_criteria: POST /api/oauth2/token with a bad client secret returns the correct OAuth error status/body, not an unhandled 500
An expired authorization code and a revoked/expired refresh token are each rejected at POST /api/oauth2/token with the correct OAuth error
A cross-origin form POST to /api/login (mismatched Origin header) is rejected by hono/csrf, while a same-origin POST is accepted
POST /api/oauth2/token and /api/oauth2/revoke with NO Origin header (machine-to-machine) are NOT rejected by hono/csrf, proving CSRF is scoped to the form routes only
An OAuthException thrown in the token/revoke handlers maps to its OAuth error response via the vanilla bridge
steps: tests/resilience.test.ts — POST /api/oauth2/token with a bad client secret returns the OAuthException error status/body (assert via app.request)
tests/resilience.test.ts — persist an auth code with a past expiresAt and assert the token exchange rejects it with the correct OAuth error
tests/resilience.test.ts — assert a revoked/expired refresh token is rejected by the refresh_token grant with the correct OAuth error
tests/resilience.test.ts — assert a cross-origin POST /api/login (mismatched Origin header) is rejected by hono/csrf and a matching-Origin POST passes

tests/resilience.test.ts — assert POST /api/oauth2/token and /api/oauth2/revoke with no Origin header are NOT blocked by hono/csrf (the requests reach the handler), proving CSRF is scoped to the login/scopes form routes and never the machine-to-machine token/revoke routes
tests/resilience.test.ts — assert OAuthException maps to its status + error body for both token and revoke through the vanilla bridge
notes: Reuses the slice-14 Vitest harness (vitest.config, tests/.env.test, globalSetup, between-test truncation); adds no new infra. Mirrors the OAuthException mapping the old token/revoke controllers did with handleExpressError. hono/csrf is origin-based and scoped to the form routes (login/scopes) only.
